description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a two-story structure with a mix of dark and light exterior wall finishes. The front facade includes a spacious balcony with glass railings, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a wooden deck area with outdoor seating and potted plants. The ground level has a sheltered entrance and a driveway bordered by tropical landscaping, including palm trees. The side and rear elevations display a combination of wood paneling and expansive glass windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rooftop is accessible and bordered by railings, suggesting potential use as a terrace. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, a balcony, and a wooden deck surrounded by tropical landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the balcony, large windows, wooden deck, driveway, and tropical plants.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, wood paneling, and the edge of the balcony with visible potted plants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying extensive glass windows, wood paneling, and the absence of the deck and landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the balcony, deck, and more of the dark exterior wall visible, along with some outdoor furniture.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and side facades
